settings.heading: Curated routes from past ROAMSOME boxes
settings.text: Explore previous country experiences, plated moments and destination-led dishes that show how the surprise format unfolds from week to week.

settings.title: Sicily Summer Table
settings.text: Bright citrus, basil, roasted vegetables and silky pasta inspired by long warm evenings on the coast.

settings.title: Kyoto Comfort Club
settings.text: A calm, umami-rich route featuring noodles, miso depth and balanced textures for relaxed evening cooking.

settings.title: Mexico City Night Market
settings.text: Layered spice, charred peppers and vibrant toppings designed to bring street-market energy to your kitchen.

settings.title: Seoul Weekend Table
settings.text: Savory marinades, crisp pickles and bold finishing sauces for a polished, high-contrast dinner experience.

settings.title: Marrakech Spice Route
settings.text: Slow warmth, fragrant spice blends and rich textures inspired by courtyard dinners and market stalls.

settings.title: Lisbon Supper Club
settings.text: Paprika warmth, citrus lift and comforting roasted elements designed for easy hosting at home.
Prepared in a kitchen that handles nuts
